name: Windows 10 on KVM (Codespaces)
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y qemu-kvm libvirt-daemon-system libvirt-clients bridge-utils cpu-checker && sudo kvm-ok
postCreateCommand: sudo docker run -d -p 8006:8006 --name windows10 --restart unless-stopped --device=/dev/kvm -v ${PWD}/oem:/oem -e VERSION="10" -e RESOLUTION="1366x768" docker.io/dockurr/windows
